title: 长期客户跟进和订单推进
theme: 从 follow-up / decision timeline / next step 开始
goals: 能在报价后、寄样后和客户沉默后进行自然跟进
能询问 decision timeline、pending decision 和 next step，推动客户给明确反馈
能用 gentle reminder 和 reconnect 维护长期客户关系，不显得催促或打扰

review.title: Day 28 复习
items: 昨天练了 best price request、competitor offer、bulk pricing、price match、final offer、cost sharing、free sample request 和 concession。
谈判时要把让步和条件绑定，不能无条件降价。
今天练客户还没下单时怎么跟进：报价后、样品后、沉默后，都要自然推进下一步。

preview.scenario: 你已经给客户发过报价、样品或最终方案，但客户暂时没有回复。你需要礼貌跟进，确认客户是否需要更多资料、内部决策时间、下一步安排或订单推进计划。
needToKnow: follow-up 是跟进，不等于催促。好的跟进要给客户一个容易回复的问题。
decision timeline 可以帮助你判断客户什么时候会做决定，而不是每天盲目追问。
next step 是推进订单最常用的表达，可以是确认样品、更新数量、发 PI 或安排付款。

vocabulary.usage: 用于报价后、样品后、会议后或客户沉默后的后续联系。
vocabulary.example: I just wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation.

vocabulary.usage: 用于发送报价后询问客户是否看过、是否需要调整或有无问题。
vocabulary.example: This is a quotation follow-up to see if you have any questions.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户收到样品后询问测试结果、修改意见或是否可以进入下一步。
vocabulary.example: May I know if you have any sample feedback after testing?

vocabulary.usage: 用于询问客户内部什么时候评估、批准或确认订单。
vocabulary.example: Could you share your decision timeline for this project?

vocabulary.usage: 用于推进客户确认样品、数量、价格、PI、付款或生产安排。
vocabulary.example: Please let me know the next step when convenient.

vocabulary.meaning: 待定决定 / 尚未决定
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户还在内部评估、等待老板确认或比较供应商时。
vocabulary.example: I understand the decision is still pending on your side.

vocabulary.meaning: 礼貌提醒 / 温和提醒
vocabulary.usage: 用于不想显得催促，但需要客户回复关键事项时。
vocabulary.example: Just a gentle reminder to check if you had time to review the proposal.

vocabulary.meaning: 重新联系 / 恢复沟通
vocabulary.usage: 用于一段时间没有联系的客户，再次开启沟通。
vocabulary.example: I wanted to reconnect and see if this project is still active.

sentences.label: 报价后跟进
sentences.natural: I just wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation.
sentences.business: I just wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation and check if you have any questions about the price, quantity, or delivery time.

sentences.label: 样品后跟进
sentences.natural: May I know if you have any sample feedback after testing?
sentences.business: May I know if you have any sample feedback after testing, or if there is anything we should adjust before the order confirmation?

sentences.label: 询问决策时间
sentences.natural: Could you share your decision timeline for this project?
sentences.business: Could you share your decision timeline for this project so we can plan production capacity and material preparation accordingly?

sentences.label: 推进下一步
sentences.natural: Please let me know the next step when convenient.
sentences.business: Please let me know the next step when convenient, such as confirming the quantity, approving the sample, or preparing the PI.

sentences.label: 唤醒沉默客户
sentences.natural: I wanted to reconnect and see if this project is still active.
sentences.business: I wanted to reconnect and check whether this project is still active, or if your team needs any updated information from our side.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太短太泛，客户不知道你在问报价、样品、数量还是订单决定。
chatAnalysis.better: I just wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: I just wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation and check if you have any questions about the price, quantity, or delivery time.

chatAnalysis.problem: 语气像责问，会让客户有压力，不适合长期客户维护。
chatAnalysis.better: Just a gentle reminder to check if you had time to review the proposal.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Just a gentle reminder to check if you had time to review the proposal, or if your team needs any updated information before making a decision.

chatAnalysis.problem: 目的太直接，只催下单，没有给客户可执行的下一步。
chatAnalysis.better: Please let me know the next step when convenient.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please let me know the next step when convenient, such as confirming the quantity, approving the sample, or preparing the PI.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：报价后跟进

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I just wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thanks. We are still reviewing it internally.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. Could you share your decision timeline for this project?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We may have an answer by the end of this week.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：样品后跟进

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: May I know if you have any sample feedback after testing?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The sample looks good, but our engineer is still checking the details.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. If anything needs adjustment, please let me know and we will check it with our factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay. I will send you the final comments tomorrow.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户沉默后重新联系

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I wanted to reconnect and see if this project is still active.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Sorry, we were busy with other projects.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No worries. Would an updated quotation or revised schedule help your team review it again?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Yes, please send an updated quotation with the latest delivery time.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：报价后、样品后和沉默客户的订单推进

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Hi, I just wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation we sent last week.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thanks for checking. We are still reviewing it with our team.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. Do you have any questions about the price, quantity, or delivery time?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The price is acceptable, but we are comparing the delivery time with another supplier.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. Could you share your decision timeline for this project?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We hope to decide by next Friday.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. That helps us plan production capacity and material preparation accordingly.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We also need to test the sample before confirming the order.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. May I know if you have received the sample already?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Yes, we received it yesterday.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Great. May I know if you have any sample feedback after testing?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The appearance is good, but our engineer needs two more days for testing.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. If anything needs adjustment, please let me know and we will check it with our factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay. I will send you the feedback once the testing is finished.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Just to plan ahead, what would be the next step if the sample is approved?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If the sample is approved, we will confirm the quantity and ask you to send the PI.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: That sounds good. Please let me know the next step when convenient.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Sure. If you do not hear from me by Friday, you can remind me.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. I will send a gentle reminder on Friday if the decision is still pending.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: That works.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Also, if your team needs any updated information, such as the latest quotation or delivery schedule, I can prepare it.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send the latest delivery schedule. That will help our internal review.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will update the schedule today and send it to you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thanks. We may have more orders later if this project goes well.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Glad to hear that. I wanted to reconnect with your team regularly and support your future projects as well.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Good. Please keep in touch and send the updated schedule first.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我只是想快速跟进一下上周发给您的报价。
exercises.answer: I just wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation we sent last week.
acceptable: i just wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation we sent last week
i wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation we sent last week
exercises.hint: quick follow-up on the quotation 是报价后自然跟进。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更专业：any update?
exercises.answer: I just wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation and check if you have any questions about the price, quantity, or delivery time.
acceptable: i just wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation and check if you have any questions about the price quantity or delivery time
i wanted to make a quick follow-up on the quotation and check if you have any questions about the price quantity or delivery time
exercises.hint: 明确跟进对象和客户可以回复的问题。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Could you share your decision ____ for this project?
exercises.hint: decision timeline 是决策时间线。

exercises.prompt: 客户很久没回复，哪个开场更适合重新联系？
options: I wanted to reconnect and check whether this project is still active.
exercises.answer: I wanted to reconnect and check whether this project is still active.
acceptable: i wanted to reconnect and check whether this project is still active
exercises.hint: reconnect 比责问更适合长期客户。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：如果样品确认通过，请告诉我下一步，例如确认数量或准备 PI。
exercises.answer: If the sample is approved, please let me know the next step, such as confirming the quantity or preparing the PI.
acceptable: if the sample is approved please let me know the next step such as confirming the quantity or preparing the pi
if the sample is approved please let me know the next step such as confirming the quantity or preparing pi
exercises.hint: next step 后面给具体选项，客户更容易回复。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：We are still reviewing it internally. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: No problem. Could you share your decision timeline for this project so we can plan production capacity accordingly?
acceptable: no problem could you share your decision timeline for this project so we can plan production capacity accordingly
no problem could you share your decision timeline so we can plan production capacity accordingly
exercises.hint: 客户内部评估时，问 decision timeline 比催单更自然。

homework: 把 follow-up、quotation follow-up、sample feedback、decision timeline、next step、pending decision、gentle reminder、reconnect 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 quotation follow-up、decision timeline 和 next step。
写一段 WhatsApp 跟进：客户上周收到报价但没有回复，你要礼貌跟进，询问是否有价格、数量或交期问题，并请客户分享 decision timeline。
tomorrow: Day 30 会做综合实战复盘，从询价、报价、样品、PI、付款、生产、物流到售后，串联完整订单流程。
